content:
LOOK AT HIIIMMMMM
he looks so lovely!! <:Pollux_cute:1459090749286252586>
I am a certified bird twins enjoyed so I saw this and had to run to gush over it a little bit haha
(though I can't quite tell if he's got his hair in a braid with a shorter bit in a little side ponytail or not, oops ^-^;; still very cute though!)
HAHAHA I can't really tell how his hair works so I'm still figuring it out 💧 I feel like he has pretty long hair so he can braid a portion of it and tie the rest up in a ponytail?
Light if you're reading this can we get a front facing sprite for Pollux soon /joke

no worries! i've studied his sprite a fair bit -- i *believe* it's just a long braid, we do see pollux from the front in the cg for his dreamscape + his chibi model, but sometimes it's hard to see the details for those, alas 😔 

i do like the thought of him like, splitting his hair in half and braiding one half and putting the other in a little ponytail haha. it feels cute!

It is very cute! I love the touches of green to him, especially in his hair, it did not look like Pollux before I added them <:Eternity_Laugh:1215113898529923072> 

It's definitely a bit hard to figure out his details sobs. Hopefully we'll get better and clearer references soon <:ChiiPlead:1217054215684358214>

yeah, absolutely. i like to think that the green in his hair is because pollux's hair is iridescent and sheens green like his and castor's feathers do, haha

😭  yeah. . . biav could we perhaps get a skin for pollux (or both of the twins). can we get a front-facing reference of pollux please. please
Is that the equivalent of virgin killer sweater?
